title: Bowie Project
description: Schema for bowie.json project configuration file

tasks.description: Named shell commands runnable via `bowie run <task>`

dependencies.description: Package dependencies mapped to commit hashes or version tags

format.description: Formatter configuration shared by the Bowie binary and editor tooling

indentStyle.description: Indentation style used by the formatter

indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indentation level

maxConsecutiveBlankLines.description: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines to keep

spaceBeforeInlineComment.description: Spaces inserted before inline # comments after code

finalNewline.description: Whether formatted files should end with a trailing newline
